name: Mary Taylor, Lt. Governor
subject: Here we go again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[

](www.JohnKasich.com)
Peter, Governor Kasich has a strong pro-life record and now anti-life groups are attacking him. **[Can you chip in and help John fight back?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29900458:28662733998:m:1:958431888:329FBEF9E8B6234A0A87F1E9A1FB675C:r)**

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29900458:28662733998:m:1:958431888:329FBEF9E8B6234A0A87F1E9A1FB675C:r)

No Governor in Ohio history has signed more pro-life legislation than Governor Kasich. The governor signed a ban on late-term abortions; began defunding Planned Parenthood; banned funding for abortions in taxpayer-funded public employee health plans; and banned elective abortions in public, taxpayer-funded hospitals.

As a result, abortions are at historic lows in Ohio and the number of clinics has been cut almost in half.

**Now anti-life groups are attacking Governor Kasich for what he believes**. [Can you help John fight back?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29900459:28662733998:m:1:958431888:329FBEF9E8B6234A0A87F1E9A1FB675C:r)

**Mary Taylor
**Lt. Governor of Ohio

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29900459:28662733998:m:1:958431888:329FBEF9E8B6234A0A87F1E9A1FB675C:r)
[
](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29900460:28662733998:m:1:958431888:329FBEF9E8B6234A0A87F1E9A1FB675C:r)
Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com

name: George P. Bush
subject: Friend: [Endorsement Missing]
body:
Friend,

It goes without saying that my family is 100% behind my dad this election.

Since my uncle emailed yesterday, thousands have stepped up to endorse my dad, but your name is still missing.

[**Friend , will you join President Bush and add your endorsement with a gift of $50, $25, or $5 for my dad right now?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/xrblkpcqsbrtgygdtpmlstnycctnqykqlpjprqydpdjv_nprddjkw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Dad needs your support, so please stand with us and add your endorsement with a gift of $50, $25, or $5 now: [**Jeb2016.com/Endorse**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/immkpbcqzdmwgrgywbfkzwtrccwtqrpqkbnbmqrybynv_nprddjkw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Thank you,

George P. Bush

**-- Begin Forwarded Message--
From: President George W. Bush
Date: August 20, 2015
Subject: What this race is about**
Dear George -

Thanks for taking the time to read my note. I rarely send emails like this, but I wanted to make sure I asked for your support on behalf of my brother, Jeb.

This is a consequential time in our nation's history, and we need a strong leader.

Jeb took on tough challenges as Florida's Governor and delivered results. I know he will do the same as President.

[**That 's why I'm asking you to stand behind him with a gift of $100, $50, or $25.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/xrplkpcqsbrtgygdtpmlstnycctnqykqlpjprqydpdjp_nprddjkw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

My brother will be a tremendous President. He is a proven leader with an optimistic outlook and a clear, conservative agenda for America's future.

He's got a tough road ahead -- take it from someone who's been there. With his strengths and your support, he will succeed. But he needs you, George: [**Jeb2016.com/Endorse**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/zspjvbfqdlskzczrkbtjdkgcffkgqcvqjbwbsqcrbrws_nprddjkw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Laura and I appreciate your consideration and send our best wishes.

Sincerely,

George W. Bush

Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=3199&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: Samantha Gross, Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: Re: staying on track
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f41/70cdc2ba/47a7c3a0/3951c63/1357504/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_midaug?refcode=em082115_1nd&amount=5.00")At the beginning of this month, we set an ambitious fundraising goal for August, with weekly benchmarks to keep on track. There's a lot of important work to budget on a nationally-watched campaign like ours -- from getting staff into the field, to rapid response infrastructure, to voter outreach -- and staying on track is important.

But as of today, we're $4,000 behind on our weekly goal, and we have to make that up before midnight. If we want to take the Senate back for Democrats, we can't afford to fall short.

**[Friend, can you contribute now towards our weekly budget goal? A contribution of any amount will help us close the gap.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f41/70cdc2ba/47a7c3a0/3951c63/1357504/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_midaug?refcode=em082115_1nd&amount=5.00")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $3 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f41/70cdc2ba/47a7c3a0/3951c60/1357504/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_midaug?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em082115_1nd")** **[Donate $10 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f41/70cdc2ba/47a7c3a0/3951c61/1357504/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_midaug?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em082115_1nd")** **[Donate $25 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f41/70cdc2ba/47a7c3a0/3951c7e/1357504/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_midaug?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em082115_1nd")** **[Or, donate another amount.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f41/70cdc2ba/47a7c3a0/3951c7f/1357504/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_midaug?refcode=em082115_1nd")** We know what voters want in their next U.S. Senator: an effective progressive fighter with a proven record of getting results for Maryland. And we know that person is Chris Van Hollen. But in order to get that message out, we need to hit every internal budget deadline.

**[Can Chris count on you? Donate now before the deadline to help keep Chris on a winning path.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f41/70cdc2ba/47a7c3a0/3951c63/1357504/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_midaug?refcode=em082115_1nd&amount=5.00")**

Thank you,

Samantha Gross
Finance Director
Van Hollen for Senate
| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f41/70cdc2ba/47a7c3a0/3951c7c/1357504/VEsO/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Chris Christie
subject: Christie Family Social Media Takeover
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Peter - The entire Christie family is heading to the Iowa State Fair tomorrow. Since this is the last weekend together before Sarah leaves us to head back to college, they thought they would have some fun and takeover my social media accounts for the weekend.
Sarah, the most social media savvy in the family, is in charge of my snapchat (add me on the app by searching for chrischristie.2016) and will certainly allow some guest appearances from her siblings Andrew, Patrick, and Bridget. They'll be sharing (or snapping?) some behind the scenes shots of the family at the fair.

The kids aren't the only social media pros in the family. Mary Pat is going to be taking over my **[Instagram (@chrischristie)](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43536621:18799753881:m:1:1516426255:466302A6C0C26EBD4F9F927A8D3E440B:r)**. Fingers crossed for no embarrassing photos!
Don't forget to follow us tomorrow on both Instagram and Snapchat. See you at the Fair!
Chris

Sent from my iPhone
****
****
****

---
| |
---|---|---
| | Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc.
---

Contributions to Chris Christie for President, Inc. are not tax deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

You can view this email in your web browser [**here**](https://email.vervemail.com/p/vJ1FMb9pDN).

P.O. Box 9119
Morristown, NJ 07963
(973) 936-9318
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com
**You can unsubscribe instantly[here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/oJ1FMb9pDN)**.
| |

name: Team Murphy
subject: URGENT: Florida's #7
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| **FLORIDA NAMED #7 IN _NATIONAL JOURNAL_ SENATE RANKINGS**
Friend,

Democrats need four seats to take back the Senate in 2016. And _National Journal 's Hotline_ just confirmed what we already knew -- **Florida could be one of the seats that makes the difference.**

We've got a tough primary ahead of us. After that, we've got a tough general election. And we need to be at the top of our game the entire way.

[_**We 've still got about $22,000 to raise to hit our $25,000 Year Out Goal -- and only about a week to do it. Rush in your contribution today.**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae202d/738133e4/3adfc3fd/7f978e8e/6682707/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150822?refcode=pme150822_b&firstname=&recurring=true")

In the past eight months, we've gotten a good look at the damage a Republican-controlled Congress can do. They've tried to restrict women's access to reproductive care. They're fighting to defund Planned Parenthood and threatening to shut down the government. _They even attacked Social Security on their very first day in power._

Democrats need to take back the Senate -- **and Patrick is one of the Democrats that can make it happen.** But we've got a long way to go, and Patrick needs us every step of the way.

[_**Help us reach our $25,000 Year Out Goal and gear up for whatever lies ahead of us. Make a contribution today.**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae202d/738133e4/3adfc3fd/7f978e8e/6682707/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150822?refcode=pme150822_b&firstname=&recurring=true")

Thanks!

Team Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae202d/738133e4/3adfc3fd/7f978e8f/6682707/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: America's looming crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

A country is not a country unless it has borders.

Most Americans understand that. But it's radical thinking to many members of BOTH parties in Washington.

Today the American people are demanding someone who will stand up and take action.

I've been fighting to secure our borders since I first entered the U.S. Senate. And I will finally get the job done if elected President.

**[Won't you please stand with me by adding your name to the fight to secure our borders](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29905361:28667018940:m:1:879035888:764426C61C289924E93EF6A7E9107505:r)**?

I know that for years politicians in BOTH parties have promised you and me secure borders, but have done nothing once in office.

Now, with election season in full swing, we're once again hearing promises to secure our borders and fix our broken immigration system from politicians out looking for votes.

Fellow Conservative, unlike some of my opponents, I'm no campaign trail convert to this issue.

I've been working to fix this problem since I first entered the U.S. Senate.

When it comes to securing our borders and enacting real immigration reform, I don't just talk the talk -- I've walked the walk.

**[Will you help me launch a grassroots revolution to force Congress to immediately secure our borders](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29905361:28667018940:m:1:879035888:764426C61C289924E93EF6A7E9107505:r)**?

Fellow Conservative, eleven million people have crossed our borders illegally . . .

. . . While our federal government looks the other way.

I voted against the Senate's so-called "immigration reform" bill because it refused to secure our borders.

This reckless legislation would have also allowed sanctuary cities to keep taxpayer dollars despite flat-out ignoring our nation's immigration laws.

Not one penny of your money should reward local governments that go on strike against our immigration laws.

And when President Obama tried to impose illegal executive amnesty, I voted against funding his lawless behavior.

Even when many in BOTH parties and the media bellowed that we needed to "get something done," I fought back because the rule of law is not up for compromise or debate.

For too long, the Washington Machine and their pals in Congress have shirked their duty while the situation at our border exploded into a full-on crisis.

This can't be allowed to stand.

Not when we know terrorist organizations are looking at our porous southern border as a way to gain entry into the United States.

Not if we are to save the concept of rule by law.

But it's going to take a revolution among the grassroots to finally secure our borders.

**[So I am asking you to add your name to the movement to restore the rule of law in America](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29905361:28667018940:m:1:879035888:764426C61C289924E93EF6A7E9107505:r)**.

And after you add your name, please chip in a contribution of $20.16 to help my campaign spread the message we must secure our borders to the voters in the key early caucus and primary states.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29905362:28667018940:m:1:879035888:764426C61C289924E93EF6A7E9107505:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29905363:28667018940:m:1:879035888:764426C61C289924E93EF6A7E9107505:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29905364:28667018940:m:1:879035888:764426C61C289924E93EF6A7E9107505:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29905365:28667018940:m:1:879035888:764426C61C289924E93EF6A7E9107505:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29905361:28667018940:m:1:879035888:764426C61C289924E93EF6A7E9107505:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29905361:28667018940:m:1:879035888:764426C61C289924E93EF6A7E9107505:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29905366:28667018940:m:1:879035888:764426C61C289924E93EF6A7E9107505:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29905367:28667018940:m:1:879035888:764426C61C289924E93EF6A7E9107505:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29905368:28667018940:m:1:879035888:764426C61C289924E93EF6A7E9107505:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

Not when we know terrorist organizations are looking at our porous southern border as a way to gain entry into the United States. Not if we are to save the concept of rule by law. But it's going to take a revolution among the grassroots to finally secure our borders. . And after you add your name, please chip in a contribution of $20.16 to help my campaign spread the message we must secure our borders to the voters in the key early caucus and primary states. | | In Liberty, Rand Paul Paid for by Rand Paul for President This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 16, 2015. For more information . | mailto:unsub-28667018940-echo3-762DA15D8D5DA0930C5B2C139FC7DA03@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings **

name: Jeff Weaver, Official Bernie 2016
subject: Last chance to become Super PACK Founding Member
body:
#
Friend -
By every measure, the grassroots enthusiasm driving our campaign is historic at this point in a presidential election:
* Driven largely by volunteer organizers, supporters have hosted over 4,500 individual organizing events attended by over 125,000 people across the country.
* Bernie's crowds in places like Seattle, Los Angeles, and Portland--Oregon AND Maine--are shocking the political establishment who underestimated us from the start.
* And over **50,000** individuals have made a monthly recurring contribution to our campaign.

**Today's the last day to get a "Founding Member" sticker** to show you're a part of Bernie's Super PACK. Are you in?
[**Add your $3 monthly recurring contribution today and we 'll send you this Bernie Super PACK founding member sticker--the last day for this offer.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2393/43f17890/5a196394/621d15e5/2186932911/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pack?refcode=em150821full&recurring=yes&amount=3")
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2393/43f17890/5a196394/621d15e5/2186932911/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pack?refcode=em150821full&recurring=yes&amount=3")
While our grassroots fundraising numbers are historically large, so is the amount of money billionaires are pouring into Super PACs for Hillary Clinton, Jeb Bush, Ted Cruz and almost every other declared candidate.
But no matter what they spend against us, **we have a plan for victory.**
That's one of the reasons your recurring contribution is **so important** : it allows us to scale our plan secure in the knowledge that we'll have the resources needed to win in Iowa and New Hampshire, and capture the delegates required for the Democratic Party nomination.
[**Join Bernie 's Super PACK with your $3 monthly recurring contribution today.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2393/43f17890/5a196394/621d15e5/2186932911/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pack?refcode=em150821full&recurring=yes&amount=3")
I hope that you're proud of the campaign we're building together. It's only possible because of your support and action.
All the best,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2393/43f17890/5a196394/621d15e5/2186932911/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pack?refcode=em150821full&recurring=yes&amount=3")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2393/43f17890/5a196394/621d15e2/2186932911/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2393/43f17890/5a196394/621d15e3/2186932911/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2393/43f17890/5a196394/621d15e0/2186932911/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2393/43f17890/5a196394/621d15e1/2186932911/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Mike Huckabee
subject: Help Me Kill Common Core
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Huckabee for President
body:
|
### [ ](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjY0NjUtMzcyMjg1ZGQtYjBlOC00ZTc2LTgzMDAtODgzMDE1YjQ0YWYyDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA2NTlmNzA1DQpodHRwOi8vbWlrZWh1Y2thYmVlLmNvbS9raWxsY29tbW9uY29yZQ0KdHJ1ZQ0KZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3d)
### [ Sign my petition ](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjY0NjUtMzcyMjg1ZGQtYjBlOC00ZTc2LTgzMDAtODgzMDE1YjQ0YWYyDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA2NTlmNzA1DQpodHRwOi8vbWlrZWh1Y2thYmVlLmNvbS9raWxsY29tbW9uY29yZQ0KdHJ1ZQ0KZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3d) if you agree we must KILL Common Core and ABOLISH the Department of Education. Education is a family function - not a federal function. Period!
Friend,

Across the country, the federal government has hijacked our education system by ramming Common Core down the throats of local governments. Washington bureaucrats are holding classrooms and kids hostage and threatening to punish those who reject their one-sized-fits-all big government mandates.

This radical, recklessness must end! We must shift power back to state and local governments. In my ten years as governor, I fought for parents, students and local control.

As President I will kill Common Core and abolish the Department of Education.

**[Add your name](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjY0NjUtMzcyMjg1ZGQtYjBlOC00ZTc2LTgzMDAtODgzMDE1YjQ0YWYyDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA2NTlmNzA1DQpodHRwOi8vbWlrZWh1Y2thYmVlLmNvbS9raWxsY29tbW9uY29yZQ0KdHJ1ZQ0KZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3d) ** next to mine if you agree we must kill Common Core and abolish the Department of Education.

Let's be clear: Washington bureaucrats and big-government central planners are out-of-control. Education decisions are best made by the most local government — Moms and Dads.

If you agree, **[sign my petition](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjY0NjUtMzcyMjg1ZGQtYjBlOC00ZTc2LTgzMDAtODgzMDE1YjQ0YWYyDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA2NTlmNzA1DQpodHRwOi8vbWlrZWh1Y2thYmVlLmNvbS9raWxsY29tbW9uY29yZQ0KdHJ1ZQ0KZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3d) ** to kill Common Core and abolish the Department of Education. Sincerely,

Mike Huckabee
---

Paid for by Huckabee for President
---
[Home](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjY0NjUtMzcyMjg1ZGQtYjBlOC00ZTc2LTgzMDAtODgzMDE1YjQ0YWYyDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA2NTlmNzA1DQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lm1pa2VodWNrYWJlZS5jb20%2fcz0ySVFBDQp0cnVlDQpkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbQ%3d%3d) | [Privacy Policy](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjY0NjUtMzcyMjg1ZGQtYjBlOC00ZTc2LTgzMDAtODgzMDE1YjQ0YWYyDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA2NTlmNzA1DQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lm1pa2VodWNrYWJlZS5jb20vcHJpdmFjeS1wb2xpY3k%2fcz0ySVFBDQp0cnVlDQpkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbQ%3d%3d) | [Unsubscribe](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjY0NjUtMzcyMjg1ZGQtYjBlOC00ZTc2LTgzMDAtODgzMDE1YjQ0YWYyDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA2NTlmNzA1DQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lm1pa2VodWNrYWJlZS5jb20vdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU%2fU3Vic2NyaXB0aW9uPWNhbXBhaWduJnM9MklRQSZFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3M9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20NCnRydWUNCmRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29t)

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Just 85 more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
We're getting down to the wire, friend, and I wanted to see if you could help out ahead of tonight's deadline.

If we get just 85 more contributions before midnight, we'll be on track to hit our August goal. Please, contribute now at this link: **[http://action.vanhollen.org/mid-August](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f4c/70cdc2ba/47a67daf/3951b4c/3239060625/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_midaug?refcode=em082115_2nd&amount=5.00")**

If we're going to take back the Senate and keep Maryland blue, we can't afford to fall short even once. Thanks for considering a contribution ahead of the deadline.

Chris

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f4c/70cdc2ba/47a67daf/3951b4d/3239060625/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
